message:
feat(combinator): derive Clone/Copy for Race marker and PartialEq/Eq for RaceResult

Race<A, B>: Add Clone and Copy implementations. Race is a zero-sized
marker type (contains only PhantomData), so Copy is correct and
eliminates unnecessary borrows when passing race configurations around.

RaceResult<A, B>: Derive PartialEq and Eq (in addition to existing
Debug and Clone). This enables direct equality assertions in tests and
pattern matching in production code without manual match arms.

Adds tests:
- race_result_eq: verify First(42) == First(42) and First != Second
- race_marker_clone_copy: verify Copy semantics (use-after-move)
- race_result_map_first_passthrough: map_first on Second is identity
- race_result_map_second_passthrough: map_second on First is identity
- race2_to_result_second_wins_err: second branch error wraps correctly

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
